headline: Why the Market Dipped But Altria (MO) Gained Today

headline: 3 Tobacco Stocks Showing Resilience Amid Market Headwinds
summary: PM, BTI and MO are navigating volume pressures and rising costs by expanding smoke-free portfolios and aligning with evolving consumer preferences.

headline: Altria Expands On! PLUS As FDA Pilot Nod Meets Valuation Debate
summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) is rolling out its on! PLUS nicotine pouches nationally after receiving the first FDA pilot authorization for a next generation nicotine pouch product. The national retail expansion follows the FDA’s expedited review under a pilot program focused on nicotine pouch products. This move introduces an FDA backed oral nicotine product to stores across the US, widening Altria’s presence in the category. Altria’s national launch of on! PLUS comes as the share price stands at...
